events.title: Attakwas Extreme
events.description: One-day MTB endurance race 120km through the Attakwas mountains.

events.title: Wines2Whales MTB
events.description: 3-day MTB stage race from the Winelands to the Whale Coast.

events.title: Tankwa Trek
events.description: 4-day MTB stage race through the Tankwa Karoo.

events.title: Cape Pioneer Trek
events.description: 7-day MTB stage race through the Cape Overberg and Klein Karoo.

events.title: Sani2C
events.description: 3-day MTB race from the Sani Pass to the KZN South Coast.

events.title: Cape Town Cycle Tour
events.description: World largest individually timed cycle race — 109km around the Cape Peninsula.

events.title: 94.7 Cycle Challenge
events.description: 94km road cycle through Johannesburg and surrounds.

events.title: Amashova Classic
events.description: 106km road cycle from Pietermaritzburg to Durban.

events.title: Berg & Bush MTB
events.description: 3-day MTB adventure ride through the Drakensberg foothills.

events.title: Karoo to Coast
events.description: Epic gravel adventure from the Karoo to the Eastern Cape coast.

events.title: Race to the Sun
events.description: 55km road race from Paarl to Hermanus.

events.title: Gravel & Tar Classic
events.description: Mixed surface gravel-road classic in the Cape Winelands.

events.title: Rock & Rut MTB Challenge
events.description: One-day MTB endurance race through the Cradle of Humankind.

events.title: Absa Cape Epic
events.description: The world most prestigious MTB stage race — 8 days through the Western Cape mountains.

events.title: JoBerg2c
events.description: 9-day MTB stage race from Heidelberg to Scottburgh through the Drakensberg.

events.title: Tanqua Kuru Bicycle Race
events.description: An epic Karoo gravel ride through dramatic semi-arid landscapes.

events.title: Nectar AMMSA MTB Festival
events.description: Epic Magaliesberg trails among wildlife and family festival vibes. Rides for all levels.

events.title: 6/24hr Eduplex MTB Race
events.description: Solo and team relay mountain bike racing on exciting Pretoria trails.

events.title: Tsitsikamma MTB Tour
events.description: A 3-day MTB ride through the spellbinding wonders of the Tsitsikamma forest.

events.title: KAP sani2c OG 2026
events.description: This is the original sani2c, where it all started. A 3-day MTB race from the Sani Pass to the KZN South Coast.

events.title: Sneeuberg Crawl MTB 2026
events.description: Experience the most beautiful part of the Karoo — across open landscapes, rugged farmland and dramatic mountain passes.

events.title: Exxaro GGC Road Race 2026
events.description: Lace up for the Exxaro Road Race Challenge. A classic SA road race event.

events.title: Dorperland MTB Gravel
events.description: A gravel MTB adventure through the stunning Bophirima landscape.

events.title: KAP sani2c Adventure 2026
events.description: The Adventure riders think they have the most fun. A 3-day MTB ride for those who want the sani2c experience with a fun twist.

businesses.name: CWCycles
businesses.description: Since 1992, CWCycles has been Cape Town's trusted source for high-quality road and mountain bikes. We stock Trek, Specialized, and Giant bikes with expert fitting services.
businesses.address: 123 Main Road, Camps Bay, Cape Town

businesses.name: CycleLab
businesses.description: CycleLab operates across three Johannesburg locations, offering comprehensive bike sales, expert repairs, and custom builds. We're the go-to workshop for serious cyclists.

businesses.name: Pro Bikes
businesses.description: Premium Specialized & Road Bike Specialists. Pro Bikes specializes in high-end road bikes, triathlon bikes, and premium components. Expert fitters on staff.

businesses.name: Pedal Power
businesses.description: Your Neighborhood Bike Shop. Mass market bike shop offering affordable bikes for the whole family, repairs, and accessories.
businesses.address: 321 Kloof Nek Road, Camps Bay, Cape Town

businesses.name: Cycle Surgeon
businesses.description: Expert Bike Repair & Maintenance Specialist. Specializing in complex repairs, wheel building, and custom modifications. We handle what others won't.
businesses.address: 555 Buitengracht Street, Salt River, Cape Town

businesses.name: Bikeology
businesses.description: High-End Road & Triathlon Specialist. Dedicated to road and triathlon cycling. Premium components, expert advice, and precision fitting.
businesses.address: 888 Main Road, Green Point, Cape Town

businesses.name: Bikestore
businesses.description: South Africa's Premier Online Cycling Retailer. Full range of bikes, components, and apparel delivered nationwide. Fast shipping, competitive prices.

businesses.name: BikesOnline.co.za
businesses.description: Importer & Distributor of Premium Bike Brands. Official importer of leading global bike brands. Supplying retailers and consumers across South Africa.

businesses.name: Sportsman's Warehouse (Cycling)
businesses.description: National Chain with Cycling Excellence. Multi-location sports retailer with dedicated cycling departments nationwide. Quality bikes and expert staff.

businesses.name: Cape Cycle Tours
businesses.description: Explore Cape Town on Two Wheels. Bike rental and guided tours throughout Cape Town. From casual city rides to challenging mountain routes.
businesses.address: 333 Waterfront Drive, V&A Waterfront, Cape Town

businesses.name: Dirt & Trail
businesses.description: MTB Specialists for Serious Trail Riders. Focused exclusively on mountain bikes. Expert advice, quality hardtails and full-suspension bikes, trail knowledge.

businesses.name: Cycle Zone
businesses.description: Pretoria's Community Bike Shop. Locally-owned bike shop serving Pretoria cyclists with quality bikes, repairs, and friendly service.

businesses.name: Bicycle Mechanic
businesses.description: Award-Winning Bike Repair & Restoration. Master mechanic with 25+ years experience. Specializing in vintage restoration and precision tuning.
businesses.address: 666 Harrington Street, Salt River, Cape Town

businesses.name: TriSports
businesses.description: Triathlon Bikes & Training Specialist. Dedicated to triathlon cycling. Tri-specific bikes, coaching partnerships, and race preparation.

businesses.name: Summit Bikes
businesses.description: Road Cycling Excellence in Cape Town. Specializing in premium road bikes and gravel bikes. Expert fitters for optimal performance.
businesses.address: 888 Victoria Road, Camps Bay, Cape Town

businesses.name: Cycle Hub
businesses.description: Durban's Bike Shop Destination. Full-service bike shop serving Durban's cycling community with quality bikes and expert repairs.

businesses.name: LifeCycle Bicycles
businesses.description: Port Elizabeth's Premier Cycle Retailer. Community-focused bike shop in Port Elizabeth offering quality bikes, expert service, and local knowledge.
businesses.address: 111 Main Street, Port Elizabeth Central, Port Elizabeth

businesses.name: Silverback Bikes
businesses.description: South African MTB Brand & Importer. Iconic SA mountain bike brand. Manufacturing and importing quality MTBs for African riders.

businesses.name: Pyga Industries
businesses.description: Premium SA Gravel & Adventure Bikes. South African manufacturer of award-winning gravel and adventure bikes. Handcrafted quality.

businesses.name: Momsen Bicycles
businesses.description: South African E-Bike Innovator. Premium e-bike brand from SA. Combining technology with local manufacturing expertise.
